AI.title: China has approved the world’s first invasive brain-computer chip—here’s what’s next
AI.summary: One day last October, sitting in the courtyard of his house in China’s Henan province, Dong Hui decided to see if he could hold a pen to write.  Dong, 39, had sustained spinal cord injuries in a car accident six years earlier that left him paralyzed from the neck down. AI.summary: Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. Apple has proved for years that Arm-based chips can perform incredibly well while also delivering great battery life - at least on the Mac. AI.title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
AI.summary: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs. AI.title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
AI.summary: Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a video shared on Telegram, a hacker shows how they could take over an account by asking Meta's chatbot to switch the email associated with someone else's profile and then reset the password. The…

AI.summary: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fu…

AI.title: Strava blames zero-code AI apps and scrapers as it tightens API access
AI.summary: The popular fitness-tracking platform, Strava, is restricting access to its API as part of efforts to clamp down on AI scraping, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. AI.title: Anthropic Confidentially Files for What Could Be the Largest IPO Ever
AI.summary: The AI giant behind Claude submitted paperwork on Monday that would take it public, just a couple of weeks after SpaceX’s splashy IPO announcement.

AI.title: Norse Atlantic Airways Offers Dirt-Cheap Tickets. There’s a Catch
AI.summary: Dozens of people have complained to the Federal Trade Commission about Norse Atlantic Airways’ tech-first customer service operation. Some said they lost thousands of dollars.

游戏.title: Maverick Games’ New Open-World Driving Game Will Be Revealed in Under 12 Hours
游戏.summary: Debut details imminent on Maverick Games' first project, a AAA open-world action-driving game led by former Forza Horizon 5 creative director Mike Brown.

游戏.summary: It looks like Sony is continuing its mission to clear the PlayStation Store of 'shovelware' games after publisher Webnetic announced its "journey on PlayStation" will soon "come to an end."

游戏.summary: Man of Steel and 300 Director Zack Snyder has reportedly signed on to write and direct an Escape from New York remake.

游戏.summary: Sega and Lionsgate have announced that their long-in-development Streets of Rage movie has just picked up Jeymes Samuel as director and Pat Casey and Josh Miller as writers.

游戏.summary: As big budget video game development gets more costly, including TV and movie-style product placement could help make up the shortfall, BioWare's former Dragon Age boss Mark Darrah has said.

科技.title: How to make the Startup Battlefield Top 20 — and what every company gets regardless
科技.summary: Every founder who applies to Startup Battlefield wants the same thing: the Disrupt Main Stage. Here’s how to get there and why the opportunity starts well before the main stage.

科技.summary: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its statement.

科技.summary: In a wild ride for 22-year-old founder and CEO Ethan Thornton, Mach Industries has raised another $300 million. It already has five autonomous vehicles in development and completed a major acquisition.

科技.summary: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

科技.summary: Several users on social media reported having their Instagram accounts hacked over the weekend. Meta's own support chatbot was blamed for allowing hackers to hijack accounts.

科技.summary: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

科技.summary: The Mall lets shoppers build a personalized feed of brands, track sales and drops, and discover products across thousands of retailers.

科技.summary: Hackers stole usernames, hashed passwords, and other data from a service that allowed players to cheat in Grand Theft Auto V.
